/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librover_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o librover_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/rover_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/rover_msgs/msg/rover_info__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rover_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/rover_msgs/msg/emergency_stop__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/giorgio/Webots/build/rover_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: librover_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
